title: LG monitors silently install software through Windows Update without consent
titleZh: LG显示器未经用户同意通过Windows更新静默安装软件
author: baranul
relevanceReason: 该帖子讨论LG显示器通过Windows Update静默安装软件的问题，涉及硬件安全、用户隐私和操作系统更新机制，属于科技与安全领域。
summaryZh: LG显示器被曝通过Windows Update静默安装软件，未经用户同意。
此举引发用户对硬件厂商与操作系统更新机制安全性的担忧。
highlightsZh: LG显示器利用Windows Update通道静默推送软件。
用户未被告知识别或授权安装行为。
引发对硬件厂商权限边界的讨论。
涉及操作系统更新机制的安全隐患。
社区对隐私与设备控制权展开激烈争论。

comments.author: devttyeu
comments.textRawHtml:
This is so much worse that the title makes it out to be:

  1. Your OS installs malware (technically manufacturers software) from a 3rd party vendor in background, zero user interaction
  2. Happens as soon as you or anyone with physical access plug in a device into the HDMI port
  3. That malware has internet and full system access, no sandboxing
  4. It starts with every system boot
  5. This software gets installed when you plug in a new LG monitor
  6. OR ALREADY HAD AN OLDER LG MONITOR PLUGGED IN, BECAUSE LG APPARENTLY ROLLED THIS OUT FOR MANY OLDER MODELS TOO!!
  7. And yes, if you think that's horrendous, as mentioned in the video below, that also applies to 'Professional' LG monitors!
This situation has.. no precedent as far as I can tell..

GamersNexus has a video diving deeper into what LG did here - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q9uefFYe6bM
comments.textZhHtml:
这比标题更糟糕：

 1. 您的操作系统在后台安装来自第 3 方供应商的恶意软件（技术上是制造商软件），零用户交互
  2. 当您或任何有物理访问权限的人将设备插入 HDMI 端口时就会发生
  3. 该恶意软件具有互联网和完整系统访问权限，没有沙箱
  4.每次系统启动时都会启动
  5. 当您插入新的 LG 显示器时，就会安装此软件
  6. 或者已经插入了较旧的 LG 显示器，因为 LG 显然也为许多较旧的型号推出了这款显示器！
  7. 是的，如果您认为这很可怕，正如下面视频中提到的，这也适用于“专业”LG 显示器！
据我所知，这种情况没有先例。

GamersNexus 有一个视频深入探讨了 LG 在这里所做的事情 - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q9uefFYe6bM

children.author: orbital-decay
children.textRawHtml:
>This situation has.. no precedent as far as I can tell..

Printer, mouse, tablet and display tablet makers use this to insert their crapware since at least Windows Vista or Windows 7, I think. The last one I remember is plugging a Razer mouse just to watch it instantly pulling 1.5GB of bloated junk with "telemetry" exfiltrating the data from my gaming PC in realtime. At least it doesn't leave my mouse in a non-working state when I disconnect the internet, like it used to. Thanks, Razer!

Microsoft is to blame here, really. They have a mechanism to block any vendor (supposedly to avoid reputational risks to their brand due to buggy drivers, at least that was their excuse back in the day), but aren't even using it to block these contraptions. Entire businesses are built on this, e.g. Razer is probably more of a marketing/data company now rather than a hardware shop.
children.textZhHtml:
>据我所知，这种情况没有先例。

我认为，打印机、鼠标、平板电脑和平板电脑制造商至少从 Windows Vista 或 Windows 7 开始就使用这种方式插入垃圾软件。我记得的最后一次是插上 Razer 鼠标，只是为了看着它立即拉出 1.5GB 的臃肿垃圾，通过“遥测”实时从我的游戏 PC 中窃取数据。至少当我断开互联网连接时，它不会让我的鼠标像以前一样处于非工作状态。谢谢，Razer！

微软确实应该为此负责。他们有一个机制来阻止任何供应商（据说是为了避免由于有缺陷的驱动程序而给他们的品牌带来声誉风险，至少这是他们当时的借口），但甚至没有用它来阻止这些装置。整个业务都是建立在这个基础上的，例如Razer 现在可能更像是一家营销/数据公司，而不是一家硬件商店。

children.author: yndoendo
children.textRawHtml:
Back in my Window days. I would start the driver installation and let it sit. Open the temp folder and copy content the install extracted to a new directory. Cancel the installation. Open Device Manager and install the drivers from there so non of the excessive bloat was installed.

This worked greater with being an IT consultant. The client's machine to run smoother and drivers installed fast since they would buy multiples of the same equipment at once.

Now I only use Linux on personal equipment. You have to pay me to use Microsoft products. Microsoft has become shit-ware.
children.textZhHtml:
回到我的窗口时代。我会开始安装驱动程序并让它静置。打开临时文件夹并将安装提取的内容复制到新目录。取消安装。打开设备管理器并从那里安装驱动程序，这样就不会安装过多的臃肿内容。

这对于 IT 顾问来说效果更好。客户的机器运行更流畅，驱动安装速度更快，因为他们会一次购买多台相同的设备。

现在我只在个人设备上使用Linux。您必须付费才能使用 Microsoft 产品。微软已经变成了垃圾软件。

children.author: IgorPartola
children.textRawHtml: To be fair Microsoft was always shitware. I don’t remember a time when using a Windows machine just worked, didn’t take up gigabytes of space, didn’t crash, and didn’t get messed up by simply using it requiring a yearly or semi-yearly reinstall.
children.textZhHtml: 公平地说，微软一直都是垃圾软件。我不记得曾经有过使用 Windows 机器能够正常工作、不占用千兆字节空间、不会崩溃、也不会因为需要每年或每半年重新安装而被搞得一团糟的情况。

children.author: inigyou
children.textRawHtml: Windows in the 95-XP era wasn't exactly high-quality software, but it was genuine technical innovation, doing what you otherwise couldn't do.
children.textZhHtml: 95-XP 时代的 Windows 并不完全是高质量软件，但它是真正的技术创新，可以实现您原本无法做到的事情。

children.author: jorvi
children.textRawHtml:
Windows 7 was also incredibly good.

And yeah, there was some pretty neat stuff. Of Linux, macOS and Windows, Windows was the first to get GPU crash recovery, just chugging onward after a stall instead of bringing the entire system down.

The biggest sign for me that Microsoft just doesn't care about Windows (aside from the ads stuffed everywhere after a fresh install) is they stopped caring about its bones. Where is Windows' equivalent of APFS / BTRFS (or even EXT4)..? NTFS is more than 20 years old by now.
children.textZhHtml:
Windows 7 也极其出色。

而且没错，确实有一些相当酷的功能。在 Linux、macOS 和 Windows 中，Windows 是第一个实现 GPU 崩溃恢复的，遇到卡顿只需继续运行，而不是让整个系统崩溃。

在我看来，微软根本不在乎 Windows 的最大迹象（除了全新安装后到处塞满的广告）就是他们不再关心它的底层架构了。Windows 相当于 APFS / BTRFS（甚至 EXT4）的文件系统在哪呢？..？NTFS 到现在已经有 20 多年历史了。

children.author: ygra
children.textRawHtml:
> Where is Windows' equivalent of APFS / BTRFS (or even EXT4)..? NTFS is more than 20 years old by now.

There's ReFS, but a lot of NTFS features are basically baked into the filesystem API, so replacing it is hard.

That being said, NTFS works extremely well and reliable. I don't really see a compelling need to replace it (which is always a messy transition unless you're completely backwards-compatible -- but in that case, NTFS has evolved a lot already).
children.textZhHtml:
> Windows相当于APFS / BTRFS（甚至EXT4）的文件系统在哪呢……？NTFS到现在已经有20多年历史了。

有ReFS，但很多NTFS特性基本上已经深度集成到文件系统API中了，所以很难替换。

话虽如此，NTFS运行得极其出色且可靠。我实在看不出有什么迫切的理由要替换它（这通常是个混乱的过渡过程，除非你能做到完全向后兼容——但即便如此，NTFS本身也已经演进很多了）。

children.author: theodric
children.textRawHtml: Our culture is to replace working things purely because they're old. Solved problem? Never heard of her.
children.textZhHtml: 我们的文化就是纯粹因为东西旧了就要把还能用的换掉。已解决的问题？听都没听过。

children.author: jorvi
children.textRawHtml:
APFS and BTRFS are objectively better than NTFS. Hell, even HFS+ and EXT4 already were.

And then there is already the next generation knocking on the door. BcacheFS is really cool and yet another step forward in performance and reliability.

Nothing stopping you from enjoying Slackware 11 on EXT2 though :)
children.textZhHtml:
客观而言，APFS和BTRFS比NTFS强得多。见鬼，就连HFS+和EXT4也早就比它强了。

而且下一代文件系统已经叩响大门。BcacheFS非常酷，在性能和可靠性上又向前迈进了一步。

不过，这并不妨碍你在EXT2上愉快地使用Slackware 11 :)

children.author: boringg
children.textRawHtml: Nothing since then.  Thats a long 30 years.
children.textZhHtml: 从那以后就没什么了。那可是漫长的 30 年啊。

children.author: hx8
children.textRawHtml: I remember when Windows didn't take gigabytes of space because there wasn't gigabytes of space, and it was still shitware.
children.textZhHtml: 我记得 Windows 没有占用千兆字节的空间，因为没有千兆字节的空间，而且它仍然是垃圾软件。

children.author: FrinkleFrankle
children.textRawHtml: Windows 2000 was incredible. It was so sleek, fast and worked so much better than XP. I'm sure it still required a lot of tinkering compared to a modern OS, but I still miss it.
children.textZhHtml: Windows 2000 简直太棒了。它流畅、迅捷，运行起来比 XP 好太多了。我确信，与现代操作系统相比，它依然需要用户花很多心思去折腾，但我还是很怀念它。

children.author: akurtzhs
children.textRawHtml:
Windows 3.1? It was only 6 3.5” disks.

To be fair, I had stretches of 2K, XP, 7 and 10 working acceptably.
children.textZhHtml:
Windows 3.1？它只有 6 个 3.5 英寸磁盘。

公平地说，我有 2K、XP、7 和 10 块磁盘可以正常工作。

children.author: chickensong
children.textRawHtml:
> Windows 3.1? It was only 6 3.5” disks.

Well ackchyually... Windows 3.1 was just a window manager, you needed another 3 disks for DOS, and if you wanted that sweet networking support, you'd need Windows for Workgroups 3.11 which was 8 disks!
children.textZhHtml:
> Windows 3.1？它只有 6 张 3.5 英寸软盘。

嗯，其实吧……Windows 3.1 只是个窗口管理器，你还需要另外 3 张软盘来装 DOS，如果你还想要那超赞的网络支持，就得用 Windows for Workgroups 3.11，那可是 8 张盘！

children.author: hx8
children.textRawHtml: These eras of Windows had their own dark patterns that were incredibly anti-consumer.  No one's lives were improved because they installed the Ask Jeeves toolbar, but people were asked to install it millions and millions of times.
children.textZhHtml: 这些时代的 Windows 也有自己那些极其反消费者的暗黑设计。没人会因为安装了 Ask Jeeves 工具栏而改善生活，但人们却被要求安装了数百万次。

children.author: LocalH
children.textRawHtml: Microsoft BASIC was a pretty decent interpreter, I wouldn't call it "shitware", so there you go?
children.textZhHtml: Microsoft BASIC 是个相当不错的解释器，我不会叫它“垃圾软件”，所以你看呢？

children.author: olyjohn
children.textRawHtml: I don't remember DOS 6.22 blue screening on me. Maybe it wasn't so bad.
children.textZhHtml: 我不记得 DOS 6.22 给我弹过蓝屏。也许它还没那么糟。

children.author: pwdisswordfishq
children.textZhHtml: 那是因为它直接黑屏了。

children.author: LocalH
children.textRawHtml: Ah for the days when the OS didn't stop you from jerking off every hardware bit
children.textZhHtml: 唉，真怀念以前那个操作系统不会阻止你把每一块硬件都折腾个遍的日子啊
